mirror_koi.name: Mirror Koi
mirror_koi.description: A calm ornamental fish with bright scales that flash like polished metal.
reed_catfish.name: Reed Catfish
reed_catfish.description: A curious fish that seems to have a symbiotic relationship with a reed plant.
mossfin.name: Mossfin
mossfin.description: A cute fish of vibrant green color that likes hiding around water plants.
lantern_eel.name: Lantern Eel
lantern_eel.description: A dark blue eel that only comes out at night to showcase its lantern-like tail.
stormray.name: Stormray
stormray.description: Has been seen circling the spots where lightning meets the ocean during a storm.
surf_perch.name: Surf Perch
surf_perch.description: A colorful fish that approaches the shoreline and is perchance too confident for its own good.
hanami_koi.name: Hanami Koi
hanami_koi.description: An ornamental Koi fish that resembles a pink flower.
coralphin.name: Coralphin
coralphin.description: A dolphin that has been taken over by an unknown species of coral, doesn't seem to mind it though.
orcanini.name: Orcanini
orcanini.description: Aww.. it's so cute! Wait.. what was that?
